name_en: Coach Factory Channel Goods New Box Bag 2.0 New Makeup Bag/Chain Shoulder Crossbody Bag. For those who listen to advice and want a box bag that fits a phone, here it is. The June new model easily accommodates Pro-sized phones, lipsticks, powders, and compacts. Size 17CM.
